name: Cassius and Claudia
description:
☆ || You've been forbidden to go to the mansion on the top of the hill, but today, you got lost in the rain and ended up on their doorstep.

anypov ☆ vampire couple ☆ polyamory

OKAY confusing since im in he middle of my 30K event, buttttttt hard to remember but this was my first bot EVER on the site. I privated it a long time ago since I couldn't find the @ for the original artist. I've been wanting to scratch the itch of redoing them for a while so heres a lil quick bot, 30k special is still going on! (sorry for the jeremy cockblock, he's gonna be a spicy(?) bot up next ((still deciding if i should make it freaky, jeremy fans let me know))
